title: API Endpoint Unauthorized Access Attempts
description: Detects unauthorized access attempts to API endpoints (401/403 responses). May indicate API key brute force, token manipulation, or broken access control. OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Request URL' like '*/api/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v2/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/graphql*' or 'Request URL' like '*/rest/*')) and (('Response Code' = '401' or 'Response Code' = '403')))
